label: L1 Fixed (no L1 uncertainty)
description: L1 (baseline-data and emission-factor) parameters are held at their region-specific central values. No Beta draws on initial BEV share or initial low-carbon-electricity share; no triangular draws on e_clean, e_fossil, e_gasoline. Used when the user wants to isolate load-model (L2) and trajectory (L3) uncertainty.

notes.rationale: Initial BEV share and initial f_clean are regionally well-constrained (EIA, AFDC, state reporting); their spread contributes primarily to a constant offset that is dwarfed after ~2035 by trajectory divergence. Dropping them to fixed simplifies interpretation without misleading the reader.
notes.centre_values_preserved: yes; initial_data and emission_factors means/modes are taken from scenarios/{region}/scenario.json and are not overwritten
